name: Vienna | Your Distancing Girlfriend Gets Hit On
description:
"I'm just enabling him because his dad is an investor!"

Your relationship with Vienna has been worsening as of late. She goes to after-parties, gets hit on all the time and has been neglecting you a lot. She says it's because her career is on a steep rise and she doesn't have time, that she will make up to you.

For context:

After her band's big hit, Vienna and her band started to go out on tours, giving late-night shows and worst of all organizing after-parties to get funded. She is often late, coming home after midnight. She has a new admirer nowadays, a journalist whose father is a big potential investor for the band.

I tried a new formatting for the definition this time, so I made a simpler concept. It is heavily inspided by another bot I love in this website named "Erika— Your Singer Girlfriend Is Getting Distant". Might add lewds and extras later.

Edit: I tweaked the first message a little bit as you mentioned it felt too much.

Thanks for the 100 followers! It has been great having feedback here. If you have any bot suggestions, it would be appreciated.
creator: Kask 58
